# Project Case Study Template

## Problem Definition

State the business or operational problem in one paragraph.

## Constraints

List the hard constraints: latency, cost, reliability, consistency, timeline, compliance.

## Architecture Decision

Describe the chosen architecture and the alternatives considered.

## Implementation Highlights

Focus on high-impact technical mechanisms, not feature inventory.

## Operational Model

Document deployment path, monitoring, rollback strategy, and incident handling.

## Results

Provide measurable outcomes where possible.

## Tradeoffs and Next Iteration

Capture what was intentionally sacrificed and what should evolve next.
